subcodes.first_line: O God! O Thou Who hast illumined the horizon of utterance through Thy Name, and at Whose Most Bountiful Name the foundations of them that disbelieved were made to quake [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی اللهم یا من انار باسمک افق البیان و تزلزلت ارکان الذین کفروا باسمک المنان
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for protection, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution
